case_title: AGUAYO ALBERTO VS LEE CHOU DBA TRANSWORLD GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,395.00 FILED BY AGUAYO ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT LEE CHOU DBA TRANSWORLD GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE CHOU DBA TRANSWORLD GROUP
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO LEE CHOU, NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR HRG.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUAYO ALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE CHOU DBA TRANSWORLD GROUP $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,508.00, IF JUDGEMENT AMOUNT IS PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS, THEN NO JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AND CASE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEE CHOU DBA TRANSWORLD GROUP
